The '''field bacta tank''', also known as the '''bacta healing station''', was a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]] produced by [[Zaltin Corporation]], and designed for easy transportability in field combat situations. It was used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] by both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], as well as numerous other factions such as the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] and the [[Hutt Cartel/Legends|Hutt Cartel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
